phases.name: Analyze
phases.description: Review the code to understand its current behavior

phases.name: Implement
phases.description: Add better exception handling for network timeouts, connection refused errors, and invalid JSON responses

steps.title: Understand the current error handling
steps.intent: Review the code to understand its current behavior
steps.validation: optional print statements or a debugger to inspect variables

steps.title: Catch specific exceptions for network timeouts and connection refused errors
steps.intent: Handle these common errors in a more robust way
steps.validation: unit tests with mock networks or connections

steps.title: Add exception handling for invalid JSON responses
steps.intent: Handle unexpected data from the Ollama API
steps.validation: integration tests with valid and invalid JSON inputs

risks: Insufficient error handling may lead to user frustration or data corruption
read_only_analysis: Review the code to understand its current behavior and identify areas for improvement
execution_notes: Use a debugger or print statements to inspect variables during execution, and write unit tests to validate the new error handling
